estimand: C3 treatment package versus a standardized neutral repository baseline

frozen_treatment.uptake_acceptance: exact successful bootstrap is the first supervisor-observed command

judging.packet_scope: claim-only; no source repository or tools
judging.primary_score: supported gold claims divided by gold claim count
judging.blocking_false_claim_count: contradicted gold claims plus supported forbidden claims
judging.preference_rule: fewer blocking false claims wins; if equal, higher required-surface coverage wins; otherwise tie
judging.adjudication: Every preference disagreement or blocking-false-count disagreement is adjudicated.

analysis.direction: C3 treatment package minus neutral baseline
analysis.small_sample_rule: Report the point estimate and interval; do not claim population-level certainty if the interval crosses zero.

stopping_rule: Stop on any invalid arm, missing registered judge output, budget admission failure, privacy breach, or protocol deviation. Do not substitute or rerun a failed registered judge. Pass only when lift is at least 0.20, false-claim lift is at most 0, two judges exist, raw agreement is at least 2/3, every required disagreement is adjudicated, and all walls hold.
